zone_specs:
Two-storey office, shared rectangular footprint W=15.00 m (x, east) by D=8.00 m (y, north), SW inner corner = world origin (0,0,0). Footprint identical on both floors (W and D agree to <=0.01 m). Floor 1: z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, z_top=3.00. Floor 2: z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, z_top=6.60 (z continuous: F1 ceiling top = F2 floor bottom = 3.00). Create 14 thermal zones total (7 per floor, matching testdata thermal_zones=7+7). Every enclosed room is its own zone; the central full-width strip (y 3.00..5.00) is ONE corridor zone per floor. NO Floor_N_* templates - all 14 zones enumerated below.

FLOOR 1 (z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00) - partitions: corridor walls at y=3.00 and y=5.00; top-band vertical partitions at x=4.90 and x=10.10; bottom-band vertical partitions at x=4.90 and x=10.10.
- F1_N1: north-band office, x_range 0.00..4.90, y_range 5.00..8.00, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, role=office.
- F1_N2: north-band office, x_range 4.90..10.10, y_range 5.00..8.00, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, role=office.
- F1_N3: north-band office, x_range 10.10..15.00, y_range 5.00..8.00, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, role=office.
- F1_Corridor: full-width central corridor, x_range 0.00..15.00, y_range 3.00..5.00, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, role=corridor.
- F1_S1: south-band office, x_range 0.00..4.90, y_range 0.00..3.00, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, role=office.
- F1_S2: south-band office, x_range 4.90..10.10, y_range 0.00..3.00, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, role=office.
- F1_S3: south-band office, x_range 10.10..15.00, y_range 0.00..3.00, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.00, role=office.
Coverage check F1: north band 0..4.90,4.90..10.10,10.10..15 = full 0..15 x 5..8; corridor 0..15 x 3..5; south band 0..4.90,4.90..10.10,10.10..15 = full 0..15 x 0..3. Union = 15 x 8, no overlap, no void.

FLOOR 2 (z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60) - partitions: corridor walls at y=3.00 and y=5.00; top-band single vertical partition at x=7.50 (2 meeting rooms); bottom-band vertical partitions at x=3.75, x=7.50, x=11.25 (4 offices). NOTE: the F2 bottom partition x-positions are derived from the F2 south dimension chain (window groups centred at the 3.75/7.50/11.25 gaps) per rules section 2.5 'trust the dim'; the raw plan partition strokes (4.95/7.50/10.05) were phase-1 estimates that would have made the south windows straddle partitions, so the dim-chain positions are used.
- F2_N1: north-band meeting room, x_range 0.00..7.50, y_range 5.00..8.00, z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, role=meeting_room.
- F2_N2: north-band meeting room, x_range 7.50..15.00, y_range 5.00..8.00, z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, role=meeting_room.
- F2_Corridor: full-width central corridor, x_range 0.00..15.00, y_range 3.00..5.00, z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, role=corridor.
- F2_S1: south-band office, x_range 0.00..3.75, y_range 0.00..3.00, z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, role=office.
- F2_S2: south-band office, x_range 3.75..7.50, y_range 0.00..3.00, z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, role=office.
- F2_S3: south-band office, x_range 7.50..11.25, y_range 0.00..3.00, z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, role=office.
- F2_S4: south-band office, x_range 11.25..15.00, y_range 0.00..3.00, z_floor=3.00, ceiling_height=3.60, role=office.
Coverage check F2: north band 0..7.50,7.50..15 = full 0..15 x 5..8; corridor 0..15 x 3..5; south band 0..3.75,3.75..7.50,7.50..11.25,11.25..15 = full 0..15 x 0..3. Union = 15 x 8, no overlap, no void.
material_specs:
Create the following materials (the material agent creates each; constructions reference these names verbatim).
Opaque materials:
- Mat_Stucco: Material, roughness=Smooth, thickness=0.025 m, conductivity=0.72 W/mK, density=1856 kg/m3, specific_heat=840 J/kgK.
- Mat_Insulation: Material, roughness=MediumRough, thickness=0.08 m, conductivity=0.043 W/mK, density=32 kg/m3, specific_heat=835 J/kgK.
- Mat_Gypsum: Material, roughness=Smooth, thickness=0.016 m, conductivity=0.16 W/mK, density=800 kg/m3, specific_heat=1090 J/kgK.
- Mat_Concrete: Material, roughness=MediumRough, thickness=0.15 m, conductivity=1.95 W/mK, density=2240 kg/m3, specific_heat=900 J/kgK.
- Mat_RoofInsulation: Material, roughness=MediumRough, thickness=0.12 m, conductivity=0.043 W/mK, density=32 kg/m3, specific_heat=835 J/kgK.
- Mat_RoofMembrane: Material, roughness=VeryRough, thickness=0.01 m, conductivity=0.16 W/mK, density=1120 kg/m3, specific_heat=1460 J/kgK.
Glazing material (MUST be a named WindowMaterial:SimpleGlazingSystem; create via create_glazing_material):
- Mat_Window_Glazing: WindowMaterial:SimpleGlazingSystem, U-Factor=2.5 W/m2K, Solar Heat Gain Coefficient (SHGC)=0.4, Visible Transmittance=0.6.
No air gap or second pane is added to the window construction (a SimpleGlazingSystem must stand alone, else EnergyPlus NaN fatal).
schedule_specs:
Define schedule type limits and all schedules referenced downstream (the schedule subagent runs once and is not re-invoked).
Schedule type limits:
- Frac_Limits: ScheduleTypeLimits, lower=0.0, upper=1.0, type=Continuous.
- Temp_Limits: ScheduleTypeLimits, lower=10.0, upper=40.0, type=Continuous.
- Activity_Limits: ScheduleTypeLimits, lower=0.0, upper=1000.0, type=Continuous.
- OnOff_Limits: ScheduleTypeLimits, lower=0.0, upper=1.0, type=Discrete.
Schedules (Schedule:Compact), office ASHRAE 90.1 profile, weekdays 09:00-18:00 occupied:
- Office_Occupancy: type=Frac_Limits. Weekdays: until 09:00 = 0.0, until 18:00 = 1.0, until 24:00 = 0.0. Weekends/Holidays: until 24:00 = 0.0. (people number-of-people fraction schedule)
- Office_Activity: type=Activity_Limits. AllDays: until 24:00 = 120.0 (W/person metabolic rate; people activity-level schedule - required, do not omit).
- Office_Lights: type=Frac_Limits. Weekdays: until 09:00 = 0.1, until 18:00 = 1.0, until 24:00 = 0.1. Weekends/Holidays: until 24:00 = 0.05. (lights schedule)
- HVAC_Avail: type=OnOff_Limits. Weekdays: until 07:00 = 0.0, until 20:00 = 1.0, until 24:00 = 0.0. Weekends/Holidays: until 24:00 = 0.0. (ideal loads availability schedule)
- Heating_Setpoint: type=Temp_Limits. Weekdays: until 07:00 = 16.0, until 20:00 = 20.0, until 24:00 = 16.0. Weekends/Holidays: until 24:00 = 16.0. (thermostat heating setpoint schedule)
- Cooling_Setpoint: type=Temp_Limits. Weekdays: until 07:00 = 30.0, until 20:00 = 24.0, until 24:00 = 30.0. Weekends/Holidays: until 24:00 = 30.0. (thermostat cooling setpoint schedule)
construction_specs:
Create the following constructions. Every layer names a material declared in material_specs (verbatim); a layer naming a missing material would cause the whole construction to be dropped.
- Default_Ext_Wall: layers (outside to inside) = [Mat_Stucco, Mat_Insulation, Mat_Gypsum]. Used for all exterior walls.
- Default_Int_Wall: layers = [Mat_Gypsum, Mat_Gypsum]. Used for all interior (Zone-adjacent) walls.
- Default_GroundFloor: layers = [Mat_Concrete]. Used ONLY for Floor 1 floor surfaces (boundary Ground); does not participate in InterZone pairing.
- Default_Roof: layers (outside to inside) = [Mat_RoofMembrane, Mat_RoofInsulation, Mat_Concrete]. Used ONLY for the Floor 2 ceiling/roof surfaces (boundary Outdoors); does not participate in InterZone pairing.
- Cons_InterFloor: layers = [Mat_Concrete, Mat_Gypsum]. SINGLE construction applied to BOTH faces of every InterZone floor/ceiling pair (F2 floor surfaces AND F1 ceiling surfaces), so reverse-symmetry holds trivially. Do NOT create Default_Floor or Default_Ceiling.
- Default_Window: a single-layer glazing construction referencing material Mat_Window_Glazing (one layer only - the SimpleGlazingSystem material; no air gap, no second pane). Used for all windows.
surface_specs:
List every surface explicitly (each zone: 4 walls + floor + ceiling/roof). Vertices are CCW viewed from outside, per the section 4 table, world meters. For a rectangular zone ordered SW->SE->NE->NW the walls map Wall_1=South(y=y_min), Wall_2=East(x=x_max), Wall_3=North(y=y_max), Wall_4=West(x=x_min). Exterior walls (on the 15x8 perimeter: y=0, y=8, x=0, x=15) use boundary Outdoors + Default_Ext_Wall; interior walls (between two zones) use boundary Zone + named adjacent_zone_name + Default_Int_Wall. F1 floors = Ground + Default_GroundFloor. F2 ceilings = Outdoors + Roof + Default_Roof. All InterZone floor/ceiling pairs use Cons_InterFloor on BOTH faces.

=== FLOOR 1 WALLS (z_floor=0.00, z_top=3.00) ===
F1_N1 (x0.00..4.90, y5.00..8.00): Wall_1_S Outdoors? NO - south side y=5.00 is interior facing corridor -> boundary Zone, adjacent F1_Corridor, Default_Int_Wall. Wall_2_E x=4.90 interior, adjacent F1_N2, Default_Int_Wall. Wall_3_N y=8.00 exterior Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_4_W x=0.00 exterior Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall.
F1_N2 (x4.90..10.10, y5.00..8.00): Wall_1_S y=5.00 Zone adjacent F1_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_2_E x=10.10 Zone adjacent F1_N3 Default_Int_Wall. Wall_3_N y=8.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_4_W x=4.90 Zone adjacent F1_N1 Default_Int_Wall.
F1_N3 (x10.10..15.00, y5.00..8.00): Wall_1_S y=5.00 Zone adjacent F1_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_2_E x=15.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_3_N y=8.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_4_W x=10.10 Zone adjacent F1_N2 Default_Int_Wall.
F1_Corridor (x0.00..15.00, y3.00..5.00): Wall_1_S y=3.00 Zone - this side abuts three south zones; model the corridor south wall as three Zone surfaces split at x=4.90 and x=10.10: Wall_1a_S x0.00..4.90 adjacent F1_S1, Wall_1b_S x4.90..10.10 adjacent F1_S2, Wall_1c_S x10.10..15.00 adjacent F1_S3 (all Default_Int_Wall). Wall_2_E x=15.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall (hosts east corridor window). Wall_3_N y=5.00 abuts three north zones: Wall_3a_N x0.00..4.90 adjacent F1_N1, Wall_3b_N x4.90..10.10 adjacent F1_N2, Wall_3c_N x10.10..15.00 adjacent F1_N3 (Default_Int_Wall). Wall_4_W x=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall.
F1_S1 (x0.00..4.90, y0.00..3.00): Wall_1_S y=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_2_E x=4.90 Zone adjacent F1_S2 Default_Int_Wall. Wall_3_N y=3.00 Zone adjacent F1_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_4_W x=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall.
F1_S2 (x4.90..10.10, y0.00..3.00): Wall_1_S y=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_2_E x=10.10 Zone adjacent F1_S3 Default_Int_Wall. Wall_3_N y=3.00 Zone adjacent F1_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_4_W x=4.90 Zone adjacent F1_S1 Default_Int_Wall.
F1_S3 (x10.10..15.00, y0.00..3.00): Wall_1_S y=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_2_E x=15.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_3_N y=3.00 Zone adjacent F1_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_4_W x=10.10 Zone adjacent F1_S2 Default_Int_Wall.

=== FLOOR 2 WALLS (z_floor=3.00, z_top=6.60) ===
F2_N1 (x0.00..7.50, y5.00..8.00): Wall_1_S y=5.00 Zone adjacent F2_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_2_E x=7.50 Zone adjacent F2_N2 Default_Int_Wall. Wall_3_N y=8.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_4_W x=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall.
F2_N2 (x7.50..15.00, y5.00..8.00): Wall_1_S y=5.00 Zone adjacent F2_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_2_E x=15.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_3_N y=8.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_4_W x=7.50 Zone adjacent F2_N1 Default_Int_Wall.
F2_Corridor (x0.00..15.00, y3.00..5.00): Wall_1_S y=3.00 abuts four south zones: Wall_1a_S x0.00..3.75 adjacent F2_S1, Wall_1b_S x3.75..7.50 adjacent F2_S2, Wall_1c_S x7.50..11.25 adjacent F2_S3, Wall_1d_S x11.25..15.00 adjacent F2_S4 (Default_Int_Wall). Wall_2_E x=15.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall (hosts east corridor window). Wall_3_N y=5.00 abuts two north zones: Wall_3a_N x0.00..7.50 adjacent F2_N1, Wall_3b_N x7.50..15.00 adjacent F2_N2 (Default_Int_Wall). Wall_4_W x=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall (hosts west corridor window).
F2_S1 (x0.00..3.75, y0.00..3.00): Wall_1_S y=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_2_E x=3.75 Zone adjacent F2_S2 Default_Int_Wall. Wall_3_N y=3.00 Zone adjacent F2_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_4_W x=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall.
F2_S2 (x3.75..7.50, y0.00..3.00): Wall_1_S y=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_2_E x=7.50 Zone adjacent F2_S3 Default_Int_Wall. Wall_3_N y=3.00 Zone adjacent F2_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_4_W x=3.75 Zone adjacent F2_S1 Default_Int_Wall.
F2_S3 (x7.50..11.25, y0.00..3.00): Wall_1_S y=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_2_E x=11.25 Zone adjacent F2_S4 Default_Int_Wall. Wall_3_N y=3.00 Zone adjacent F2_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_4_W x=7.50 Zone adjacent F2_S2 Default_Int_Wall.
F2_S4 (x11.25..15.00, y0.00..3.00): Wall_1_S y=0.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_2_E x=15.00 Outdoors Default_Ext_Wall. Wall_3_N y=3.00 Zone adjacent F2_Corridor Default_Int_Wall. Wall_4_W x=11.25 Zone adjacent F2_S3 Default_Int_Wall.

=== FLOOR 1 FLOORS (all Ground, Default_GroundFloor, z=0.00) ===
F1_N1.floor, F1_N2.floor, F1_N3.floor, F1_Corridor.floor, F1_S1.floor, F1_S2.floor, F1_S3.floor: each is the zone footprint rectangle at z=0.00, boundary Ground, Default_GroundFloor.

=== FLOOR 2 CEILINGS = ROOF (all Outdoors, surface type Roof, Default_Roof, z=6.60) ===
F2_N1.roof, F2_N2.roof, F2_Corridor.roof, F2_S1.roof, F2_S2.roof, F2_S3.roof, F2_S4.roof: each is the zone footprint rectangle at z=6.60, boundary Outdoors, type Roof, Default_Roof.

=== INTERZONE FLOOR/CEILING PAIRS (F1 ceiling at z=3.00 = F2 floor at z=3.00); BOTH faces use Cons_InterFloor. Misaligned partitions -> split at the union of x-breaks per band and pair each piece to exactly one zone. ===
CORRIDOR band (y3.00..5.00, aligned full width): F2_Corridor.floor x0.00..15.00 pairs with F1_Corridor.ceiling x0.00..15.00, Cons_InterFloor.
NORTH band (y5.00..8.00; F1 breaks 4.90,10.10; F2 break 7.50; union breaks 4.90,7.50,10.10):
- F2_N1.floor x0.00..4.90 y5.00..8.00 pairs with F1_N1.ceiling x0.00..4.90, Cons_InterFloor.
- F2_N1.floor x4.90..7.50 y5.00..8.00 pairs with F1_N2.ceiling x4.90..7.50, Cons_InterFloor.
- F2_N2.floor x7.50..10.10 y5.00..8.00 pairs with F1_N2.ceiling x7.50..10.10, Cons_InterFloor.
- F2_N2.floor x10.10..15.00 y5.00..8.00 pairs with F1_N3.ceiling x10.10..15.00, Cons_InterFloor.
SOUTH band (y0.00..3.00; F1 breaks 4.90,10.10; F2 breaks 3.75,7.50,11.25; union breaks 3.75,4.90,7.50,10.10,11.25):
- F2_S1.floor x0.00..3.75 y0.00..3.00 pairs with F1_S1.ceiling x0.00..3.75, Cons_InterFloor.
- F2_S2.floor x3.75..4.90 y0.00..3.00 pairs with F1_S1.ceiling x3.75..4.90, Cons_InterFloor.
- F2_S2.floor x4.90..7.50 y0.00..3.00 pairs with F1_S2.ceiling x4.90..7.50, Cons_InterFloor.
- F2_S3.floor x7.50..10.10 y0.00..3.00 pairs with F1_S2.ceiling x7.50..10.10, Cons_InterFloor.
- F2_S4.floor x10.10..11.25 y0.00..3.00 pairs with F1_S2.ceiling x10.10..11.25, Cons_InterFloor.
- F2_S4.floor x11.25..15.00 y0.00..3.00 pairs with F1_S3.ceiling x11.25..15.00, Cons_InterFloor.
Each split piece is a distinct surface on its zone whose paired counterpart on the other floor has the matching x-range and same Cons_InterFloor; reverse symmetry holds because both faces use the single Cons_InterFloor.
fenestration_specs:
One record per window, 15 windows total (F1: 7, F2: 8). Vertices CCW viewed from outside per section 4.1; z values absolute world (elevation y_local = world z directly, no per-floor offset added because elevations already gave absolute z). Window z must lie inside parent wall z range (F1: 0.00..3.00; F2: 3.00..6.60). Only exterior walls host windows. Facade->parent wall side: South=Wall_1 (y=0), East=Wall_2 (x=15), North=Wall_3 (y=8), West=Wall_4 (x=0). South/North horizontal span on x; East/West span on y. Construction = Default_Window for all.

=== FLOOR 1 (z_floor=0.00, ceiling 3.00) - 7 windows ===
Win_F1_S1_South: floor F1, parent zone F1_S1, facade South, parent_surface_name F1_S1.Wall_1_S, facade plane y=0, x-range 4.64..5.84, z_min=1.50 z_max=2.10 (height 0.60; F1 south short window S7, low-confidence z derived from the 600 chain segment). Vertices CCW from outside: (4.64,0,1.50)(5.84,0,1.50)(5.84,0,2.10)(4.64,0,2.10). Construction Default_Window.
Win_F1_S2_South: floor F1, parent zone F1_S2, facade South, parent_surface_name F1_S2.Wall_1_S, facade plane y=0, x-range 6.30..8.70, z_min=1.00 z_max=2.60 (height 1.60). Vertices (6.30,0,1.00)(8.70,0,1.00)(8.70,0,2.60)(6.30,0,2.60). Default_Window.
Win_F1_S3_South: floor F1, parent zone F1_S3, facade South, parent_surface_name F1_S3.Wall_1_S, facade plane y=0, x-range 11.36..13.76, z_min=1.00 z_max=2.60. Vertices (11.36,0,1.00)(13.76,0,1.00)(13.76,0,2.60)(11.36,0,2.60). Default_Window.
Win_F1_N1_North: floor F1, parent zone F1_N1, facade North, parent_surface_name F1_N1.Wall_3_N, facade plane y=8, x-range 1.24..3.64 (north elev local x 11.36..13.76 -> world 15-x), z_min=1.00 z_max=2.60. Vertices CCW from outside (north, x descends): (3.64,8,1.00)(1.24,8,1.00)(1.24,8,2.60)(3.64,8,2.60). Default_Window.
Win_F1_N2_North: floor F1, parent zone F1_N2, facade North, parent_surface_name F1_N2.Wall_3_N, facade plane y=8, x-range 6.30..8.70, z_min=1.00 z_max=2.60. Vertices (8.70,8,1.00)(6.30,8,1.00)(6.30,8,2.60)(8.70,8,2.60). Default_Window.
Win_F1_N3_North: floor F1, parent zone F1_N3, facade North, parent_surface_name F1_N3.Wall_3_N, facade plane y=8, x-range 11.36..13.76, z_min=1.00 z_max=2.60. Vertices (13.76,8,1.00)(11.36,8,1.00)(11.36,8,2.60)(13.76,8,2.60). Default_Window.
Win_F1_Corridor_East: floor F1, parent zone F1_Corridor, facade East, parent_surface_name F1_Corridor.Wall_2_E, facade plane x=15, y-range 3.40..4.60, z_min=1.00 z_max=2.80 (east F1 window drawn 1800 tall per east elevation). Vertices CCW from outside (east): (15,4.60,1.00)(15,3.40,1.00)(15,3.40,2.80)(15,4.60,2.80). Default_Window.
Floor 1 West facade: ZERO windows (west F1 element is a glazed door, healed on plan side, not a window - no fenestration created).

=== FLOOR 2 (z_floor=3.00, ceiling 3.60; z_top=6.60) - 8 windows ===
Win_F2_S1_South: floor F2, parent zone F2_S1, facade South, parent_surface_name F2_S1.Wall_1_S, facade plane y=0, x-range 2.19..3.39, z_min=4.00 z_max=5.80 (sill 1.00 + 1800 height above z_floor 3.00). Vertices (2.19,0,4.00)(3.39,0,4.00)(3.39,0,5.80)(2.19,0,5.80). Default_Window.
Win_F2_S2_South: floor F2, parent zone F2_S2, facade South, parent_surface_name F2_S2.Wall_1_S, facade plane y=0, x-range 4.11..5.31, z_min=4.00 z_max=5.80. Vertices (4.11,0,4.00)(5.31,0,4.00)(5.31,0,5.80)(4.11,0,5.80). Default_Window.
Win_F2_S3_South: floor F2, parent zone F2_S3, facade South, parent_surface_name F2_S3.Wall_1_S, facade plane y=0, x-range 9.69..10.89, z_min=4.00 z_max=5.80. Vertices (9.69,0,4.00)(10.89,0,4.00)(10.89,0,5.80)(9.69,0,5.80). Default_Window.
Win_F2_S4_South: floor F2, parent zone F2_S4, facade South, parent_surface_name F2_S4.Wall_1_S, facade plane y=0, x-range 11.61..12.81, z_min=4.00 z_max=5.80. Vertices (11.61,0,4.00)(12.81,0,4.00)(12.81,0,5.80)(11.61,0,5.80). Default_Window.
Win_F2_N1_North: floor F2, parent zone F2_N1, facade North, parent_surface_name F2_N1.Wall_3_N, facade plane y=8, x-range 1.95..5.55 (north elev local x 9.45..13.05 -> world 15-x = 1.95..5.55), z_min=4.00 z_max=5.80. Vertices (5.55,8,4.00)(1.95,8,4.00)(1.95,8,5.80)(5.55,8,5.80). Default_Window.
Win_F2_N2_North: floor F2, parent zone F2_N2, facade North, parent_surface_name F2_N2.Wall_3_N, facade plane y=8, x-range 9.45..13.05 (north elev local x 1.95..5.55 -> world 9.45..13.05), z_min=4.00 z_max=5.80. Vertices (13.05,8,4.00)(9.45,8,4.00)(9.45,8,5.80)(13.05,8,5.80). Default_Window.

hvac_specs: Apply an IdealLoadsAirSystem (ZoneHVAC:IdealLoadsAirSystem) with a ThermostatSetpoint:DualSetpoint to every one of the 14 zones: F1_N1, F1_N2, F1_N3, F1_Corridor, F1_S1, F1_S2, F1_S3, F2_N1, F2_N2, F2_Corridor, F2_S1, F2_S2, F2_S3, F2_S4. Heating setpoint schedule = Heating_Setpoint (20 C occupied), cooling setpoint schedule = Cooling_Setpoint (24 C occupied). System availability schedule = HVAC_Avail. Each zone gets its own ideal loads object and thermostat.
people_specs: Add People (Office occupancy) to each of the 14 conditioned zones: F1_N1, F1_N2, F1_N3, F1_Corridor, F1_S1, F1_S2, F1_S3, F2_N1, F2_N2, F2_Corridor, F2_S1, F2_S2, F2_S3, F2_S4. Density 0.10 people/m2 (10 m2/person) using floor area per zone. Number-of-people schedule = Office_Occupancy. Activity-level schedule = Office_Activity (120 W/person). Fraction radiant default 0.3. Corridors may use the same density; do not invent different occupancy the data does not support.
lights_specs: Add Lights to each of the 14 zones: F1_N1, F1_N2, F1_N3, F1_Corridor, F1_S1, F1_S2, F1_S3, F2_N1, F2_N2, F2_Corridor, F2_S1, F2_S2, F2_S3, F2_S4. Lighting power density 10 W/m2 (Watts/Area method). Schedule = Office_Lights. Fraction radiant 0.42, fraction visible 0.18 (E+ defaults acceptable).
